bugs.root_cause: Code path had no error handling — exceptions would propagate uncaught
Had 's advocate, synthesis, conclusion. Use with `
bugs.fix: Changed to 's advocate, synthesis, conclusion. **Always use `
Changed to 's advocate, synthesis, conclusion. Iterate with `

bugs.error_message: Node jobs with dead PID entered waiting/recovery_pending causing wait-phase stalls
bugs.root_cause: Dead-PID handlers branched on node_id and mapped node jobs to waiting/recovery_pending instead of terminal error
bugs.fix: Unified dead-PID handling in detached watchdog and crashRecovery to always set status=error with message and last_event_at_ms; added node_id regression test

bugs.root_cause: init hardcoded legacy active/claude and active/pi roots in symlink validation, installation, and help text after xt installer flattened active/
bugs.fix: switched init to flattened active root only, updated active symlink wiring/validation/help text, and updated unit+integration tests

bugs.error_message: Published package still enforced active/claude because dist/index.js was stale
bugs.root_cause: Source fix landed in src/cli/init.ts but release published without rebuilding bundled dist, so CLI behavior on npm remained old
bugs.fix: Rebuild dist/index.js before release, verify bundled output strings, then bump patch and republish

bugs.error_message: specialists init aborted on legacy .pi/.claude skill root symlinks after flattened active migration
bugs.root_cause: validator accepted only exact flattened target and did not auto-rewire repos still pointing at active/pi or active/claude
bugs.fix: legacy root symlinks are now rewritten in place to flattened active root during init; tests cover both .pi and .claude cases

bugs.error_message: sp init --sync-defaults left stale files in .specialists/default unchanged
bugs.root_cause: existing canonical specialist and node config files were skipped instead of refreshed during explicit sync
bugs.fix: copyCanonicalSpecialists and copyCanonicalNodeConfigs now overwrite existing canonical files during --sync-defaults; regression tests added

bugs.error_message: Executor verification path attempted vitest/bun tests and job died before completion
bugs.root_cause: I treated executor verification like a normal local test step instead of following the project rule that executors do not use Bun/Vitest here.
bugs.fix: Do not request vitest or bun test commands from executors; restrict executor verification to lint/tsc and run tests through reviewer/test-runner or manual follow-up outside the executor path.

bugs.error_message: MEDIUM/HIGH specialist --bead runs die at startup with status=starting/dead and no feed/events; foreground shows existing undefined job 'undefined' already active
bugs.root_cause: SqliteClient.claimJobStart transaction wrapper returned Bun db.transaction(callback) function without invoking it, so Supervisor received a function instead of ClaimJobStartResult and threw before run_start persistence.
bugs.fix: Invoke the Bun transaction wrapper with this.db.transaction(callback)(); added real SQLite regression proving claimJobStart persists status and run_start.

bugs.error_message: validate-specialist helper failed from project root with Cannot find module ../../../src/specialist/schema.ts
bugs.root_cause: helper lived one directory deeper than its relative import assumed; scaffold helper used ../../../../src while validator used ../../../src
bugs.fix: changed parseSpecialist import to ../../../../src/specialist/schema.ts and verified bundled validator against security-auditor, code-sanity, and explorer configs

bugs.error_message: sp doctor/status from published v3.12.0 crashed with Cannot find module '../../package.json' from dist/index.js and security-auditor shipped machine-local optional skill paths
bugs.root_cause: Bundled dist runs one directory shallower than src/cli, so ../../package.json points outside the npm package; security-auditor config used absolute dev-machine xtrm optional skill paths instead of repo-relative paths.
bugs.fix: Version check now tries both ../package.json and ../../package.json with safe fallback; security-auditor optional skills now use .xtrm/skills/optional/... relative paths; v3.13.0 release verifies installed sp doctor no longer fatals.

bugs.error_message: script-runner pi calls leaked CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md/skills/prompt templates/themes into script-class specialist prompts
bugs.root_cause: runSingleAttempt used pi isolation flags for session/tools/extensions only; pi still auto-discovered project context files, skills, prompt templates, and themes after --system-prompt.
bugs.fix: Added --no-context-files --no-skills --no-prompt-templates --no-themes to script-runner pi argv, rebuilt dist/index.js, and added a regression test asserting the flags.

bugs.error_message: script-runner passed rendered task prompts as pi argv, exposing prompt text in process lists and risking CLI misparse for -- or @-prefixed content
bugs.root_cause: runSingleAttempt appended the rendered prompt to the pi argument array and spawned pi with stdin ignored.
bugs.fix: Removed prompt from argv, spawned pi with stdin pipe, wrote the rendered prompt to stdin, closed stdin, swallowed stdin EPIPE/error events, rebuilt dist, and added regression tests for argv absence, stdin write/end, and stdin error handling.

bugs.error_message: sp serve emitted no per-request operational logs for POST /v1/generate
bugs.root_cause: HTTP serve route only printed startup readiness text and relied on observability.db audit rows, leaving stdout/stderr empty during production traffic.
bugs.fix: Added structured non-PII generate logging with trace_id, specialist, resolved_specialist, model, status/error_type, duration_ms, prompt_bytes, short error, and --log-level off|info|debug; added integration coverage.

bugs.error_message: Uncommitted xtrm hook drift would clear memory-gate sentinel and remove DB-first specialist completion metadata lookup
bugs.root_cause: Generated/uncommitted hook refresh regressed repo-local fixes while the latest report had not captured newer reviewer evidence commits.
bugs.fix: Backed up dirty patches, reverted unsafe hook changes to HEAD, preserved intentional dist/report/changelog/beads/GitNexus context updates, and documented cleanup in report.

bugs.error_message: sp ps System health showed OK while dolt=27 and orphans=6 during unitAI-uof0t manual validation
bugs.root_cause: Health severity only considered RSS thresholdPct and ignored Dolt sql-server count and orphan count, despite the bead contract requiring Dolt >1 to surface as a regression alert.
bugs.fix: Added ProcessHealthReport.status/statusReasons; status becomes WARN for doltCount >1 or orphanCount >0 and ps renders alert reasons. Added unit coverage and manual ps validation.
